title: Netskope Logs managed ingestion connector (Beta) ​
body:
**June 20, 2026**

The Netskope Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest event and alert logs from Netskope into Databricks. See [Netskope Logs connector](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/netskope-logs).
